rationale_per_step.centralize-tier-config: Tech debt: unify duplicated TIER_META/tierConfig (labels, colors, descriptions, icons) between weights.ts (enrichment) and tiered-results-display.tsx. Supports consistent vector search discovery UI after recent search-eval work.
rationale_per_step.surface-search-scores-ux: Feature improvement on UI/UX: surface existing semantic_score, name_score, text_score, final_score, tier fields from SearchResult (already computed and returned by API) to users for trust and intuitive discovery. Advances vector search + UI/UX facets.
rationale_per_step.configurable-research-provider: Feature improvement: drive research agent LLM choice (deep-research-agent.ts hardcodes OPENAI) from config/env instead of hard-coded. Improves reliability of agent research facet without changing core flows.
rationale_per_step.remove-dead-vertex-env-requirement: Maintenance: remove unused VERTEX_API_KEY from required env schema (embeddings use only OpenAI provider; vertexai flag in Google LLM is unrelated). Reduces onboarding friction and stale config surface area.

notes: Updated after merge of semantic-search-scenario-eval (completed; confirmed via git log and new src/eval/semantic-search-scenario-smoke.ts). feature_list.json remains exhausted. Carried remaining prior candidates + 1 small maintenance for rebalance. Avoided testing_observability to counter recent heavy eval/ci focus. Used spawn_subagent (vision-align + category-balance + memory-recon) + corridor__analyzePlan. Ruflo memory 'harness:horizon' unavailable (MCP timeout, same as prior runs); state persisted to horizon.json + .codex/tmp plan artifacts. Corridor security context incorporated (secure config, no client exposure of internal tier/provider details).
